title: Phase Pulse
description: A lightweight mod for Minecraft that bridges in-game events to the Phase Pal desktop companion app. Sends real-time player and world events via local TCP to enable ambient companion reactions.
body:
![Phase Pulse logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23ef797e4b23b592c79546c88204793f7f5785ef.png)
**Your Minecraft world feels less empty now.**

Phase Pulse connects your Minecraft gameplay to Phase Pal, an AI companion that sits on your desktop, reacts to everything you do, and keeps you company during solo sessions.

Mining diamonds? They celebrate.  
Low on health? They worry.  
Beat the Ender Dragon? They lose their mind.

Never mine alone.

---

### **What Phase Pulse Does**

Phase Pulse monitors 24+ in-game events and sends them to your Phase Pal desktop companion. Your Pal reacts in real time, cheering victories, warning of danger, and chatting when you want company.

**Player Events**

* Low health warnings
* Hunger alerts
* Drowning detection
* Eating, sleeping, and waking
* Damage taken & death events
* Advancements earned

**World Events**

* Day/night transitions
* Weather changes (clear, rain, thunder)
* Discovering new biomes and structures

**Combat Events**

* Combat start & end
* Hostile mobs nearby
* Enemy defeats

**Chat Commands**

* `/pal <message>` — Send a message to Phase Pal
* `/pal speak <message>` — Have Phase Pal speak aloud

No tab-switching. No interruptions. Just company.

### **Photos**
![The Phase Pal Character is saying "Haven't seen this place before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d11b9121a8e86358657904f4705ca8aa0654_0.webp)![The player is saying "What should I do" and the Phase Pal character is thinking. Below the player is Zombie and creepers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0052914d75405638e23f1c8468ce93d4232931bf_0.webp)
![The Phase Pal character is saying "Haven't seen this place before", the player is in a cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d11b9121a8e86358657904f4705ca8aa0654_0.webp)![The Phase Pal is saying "Green and mean incoming!" as creepers approach the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20e1f2a983bf110d3225afc7f90098aa228f8144_0.webp)![The Phase Pal is saying "Fight" as a Mob zombie approaches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6824366efc80606204592dea7d87b4050babffa_0.webp)
### **Technical Notes**

**Firewall:**
Phase Pulse communicates only with your local machine (127.0.0.1).
No internet connection is required and no data leaves your computer.
If you experience issues, ensure TCP port **32145** is not blocked.

---

### **About Phase Pal**

Phase Pal is a free desktop companion app that reacts to your Minecraft gameplay in real time.
It uses the events from Phase Pulse to provide ambient companionship, celebrating your victories, warning you of danger, and keeping you company during your adventures.

Download Phase Pal: **[https://phasepal.com](https://phasepal.com)**

---

### **Requirements**
* Fabric Loader **0.18.4+**
* Fabric API: [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
⚠️ **Important:** This mod does nothing on its own. It only sends event data to Phase Pal. If Phase Pal is not running, the mod silently waits for connection.

## Support
- Steam: [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3655450/Phase_Pal)
- Discord: [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/DV5UsE7qy7)
- Website: [Phase Pal](https://phasepal.com)
